serviceHealth.observation: localhost:5432 accepted connections during validation setup.

commands.observation: turbo run build completed successfully; the build finished with 5 successful tasks and emitted the Remix stats route client asset without errors.
turbo run lint completed successfully with 0 errors; existing warnings remained in @documenso/ui, @documenso/trpc, and @documenso/lib but did not fail lint.

nonBlockingFindings.description: The flow validator noted that the fire-and-forget posthog-js dynamic import chains still lack .catch() handlers, which could surface an unhandled promise rejection if the chunk fails to load.
